titlestmt.titleproper: Pamphlets on venereal disease (sexually transmitted disease)
Venereal disease (sexually transmitted disease), pamphlets on
titlestmt.author: Katherine Isham

publicationstmt.publisher: Medical Historical Library, Cushing/Whitney Medical Library

maintenanceagency.agencyname: Medical Historical Library, Cushing/Whitney Medical Library

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Wednesday December 18, 2024 at 22:02

did.unittitle: Pamphlets on venereal disease (sexually transmitted disease)

corpname.part: Medical Historical Library, Cushing/Whitney Medical Library

did.abstract: The collection includes printed materials on venereal disease issued by the United States Public Health Service and other federal agencies, US state govenment agencies, and other organizations in the United States and Europe from 1910-1961. Topics include facts about syphilis and gonorrhea, treatment of sexually transmitted diseases, rates of infection, blood tests, and pregnancy complications from syphilis infection.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The collection is open for research.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Organized in four series: Series I. United States Public Health Service and other federal government agencies, 1915-1961. Series II. US state govenment agencies, 1933-1940, undated. Series III. United States, other sources, 1910-1943, undated. Series IV. Other countries, 1915-1940, undated.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Pamphlets on venereal disease. Historical Library, Harvey Cushing / John Hay Whitney Medical Library, Yale University.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The collection includes printed materials on venereal disease issued by the United States Public Health Service and other federal government agencies, US state government agencies, and other organizations in the United States and Europe from 1910-1961. Topics include facts about syphilis and gonorrhea, treatment of sexually transmitted diseases, rates of infection, and blood tests before marriage to prevent transmission of sexually transmitted diseases to children.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright status for other collection materials is unknown. Transmission or reproduction of materials protected by U.S. Copyright Law (Title 17, U.S.C.) beyond that allowed by fair use requires the written permission of the copyright owners. Works not in the public domain cannot be commercially exploited without permission of the copyright owners. Responsibility for any use rests exclusively with the user.

did.unittitle: United States Public Health Service and other federal government agencies

Blue, Rupert, United States Public Health Service, Keeping fit . V.D. Bulletin no. 1. Washington, D.C.: Government Printing Office, 1918.

United States Public Health Service, Why should high schools and colleges provide Sex instruction? V.D. no. 10. Washington D.C., circa 1915.
United States Public Health Service, Come clean! Government Printing Office, 1918.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Issued for the Provost Marshal General by the United States Public Health Service.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Materials include Preliminary program, Plan of meetings, and three letters.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Cover article "Beating out the fires around military camps: venereal diseases are being checked and blotted out." Hansen #4179.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Brochure designed like a newsreel and single sheet with 20 questions and answers.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Pamphlet includes discussion of sexually transmitted disease.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Full-page map of the United States showing rates of syphilis infection on back cover.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes a small note in English with brief description of the report.

scopecontent.p: In English, Polish, Spanish, and Italian.

did.unittitle: Davis, Dr. A. Burton, New York Manhattan-Bronx street car, bus, subway elevated and health guide . New York City, New York, 1935.
Matchbook covers

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Most of the matchbook covers in the series were probably manufactured for distribution to military personnel during World War II. they may have been included in rations or made available on military bases.

did.unittitle: American Match Corporation, "V.D. loves everybody!" Providence, Rhode Island.
D.D. Bean and Sons, "You're no match... for V.D." Jaffrey, New Hampshire.
Lion Match Incorporated, "Even Snafu knows..... V.D. can be prevented!" New York City, New York.
Lion Match Incorporated, "V.D.: easy to pick-up." New York City, New York.
Match Corporation of America, "V.D.: easy to pick-up." Chicago, Illinois.
Universal Match Corporation, "Even Snafu knows..... V.D. can be prevented!" St. Louis, Missouri.
Universal Match Corporation, "V.D.: easy to pick-up." St. Louis, Missouri.
